title: Shootout at Lokhandwala
subTitle: On a calm summer day in 1991, in the bustling Lokhandwala Complex, five criminals including Maya and Dilip were counting 70 lakhs in flat No 32B, when 286 policemen, headed by ACP Khan, took strategic positions around their building. A gunfire ensued and the entire nation witnessed the most talked about daylight encounter lasting 6 hours that transformed suburban Mumbai into a virtual war zone.

title: Mahadev Ka Gorakhpur
subTitle: When evil descends chaotically upon the goodness of the land, a righteous warrior of Lord Shiva arrives to deliver justice to the wicked.

title: 1947: Earth
subTitle: The disaster of Indian/Pakistani partition seen through the eyes of a child - Lenny, an eight-year-old crippled girl - from Lahore, the Punjabi city that saw some of the bloodiest pogroms. The experiences, hopes and fears of this young girl provide an intense portrait of the period.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Pankh
subTitle: Film highlighting a phenomenon peculiar and exclusive to the Indian film industry, the practise of casting children in roles opposite to their natural genders.

title: Thadam
subTitle: Identical twins are taken into police custody in a murder case.

title: Theeran
subTitle: An honest police officer finds himself transferred again and again due to his sincerity. After his latest transfer, he comes across a file that involves a gang of ruthless thieves who loot and kill along the highway.

title: Rider
subTitle: As love blossoms between orphans Chinnu and Kitty, fate separates them as children. However, they grow up yearning to find each other.

title: Maragadha Naanayam
subTitle: Two small-time thieves who work for a jewel smuggler take up a contract to locate a cursed emerald medallion. With the help of a priest, they summon three spirits to guide them in their quest.

title: Tanhaji: The Unsung Warrior
subTitle: Subhedar Tanhaji, better known as Chhatrapati Shivaji's right-hand man, does whatever it takes to preserve the honour of the Marathas in a critical battle against Mughal chieftain Udaybhan Singh Rathore.

title: ACP Shiva
subTitle: Shivakumar, a dishonest cop, ensures that he is transferred to Chennai, where he exploits his position for financial gain. He also supports GK, a local MP, against the commissioner of Chennai.

title: Chithha
subTitle: Living a quiet life with his niece, Eeswaran manages to provide for her and nurtures her like a parent. However, his journey takes an insidious turn when she goes missing.

title: Chithha
subTitle: Living a quiet life with his niece, Eeswaran manages to provide for her and nurtures her like a parent. However, his journey takes an insidious turn when she goes missing.

title: Coolie Raja
subTitle: When an arrogant businessman and his daughter frame a poor porter in a rape case, he hatches a plan to marry her and teach them a lesson.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Hey! Sinamika
subTitle: Weather scientist Mouna falls in love with quirky and loving Yaazhan, but their relationship takes an unexpected turn when psychologist Dr Malarvizhi arrives in town.

title: The Great Veera
subTitle: A man wants to avenge his family's death which has been mass murdered by a bad guy.

title: Kabali
subTitle: When Kabali raises his voice against the oppression faced by Tamil labourers in Malaysia, he is imprisoned for 25 years. After being released, he seeks revenge on the ones who wronged him.

title: Yajamana
subTitle: Krishna, the son-in-law of the village head, tries to defend his village by fighting against a cruel criminal disguised as a business tycoon, Devi Shetty.

title: Balloon
subTitle: In hopes of finding inspiration for a script, an aspiring filmmaker moves near a house that has a reputation of being haunted.

title: Jack
subTitle: The main character is struggling to understand his son, Pablo Neruda. Unaware of his son's activities, he is desperate to find out what he does for a living.

title: Veera Simha Reddy
subTitle: In a high-octane fight against injustice, Veera Simha Reddy must forsake the love of his life, the joys of fatherhood, and the trust of a person whom he cherishes deeply.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur
subTitle: Sardar sets out to avenge his father who was murdered by Ramadhir Singh, a cunning politician and mining kingpin. In the ensuing war, many unresolved family feuds erupt creating unrest.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur
subTitle: Sardar sets out to avenge his father who was murdered by Ramadhir Singh, a cunning politician and mining kingpin. In the ensuing war, many unresolved family feuds erupt creating unrest.

title: Ek Aur Mrityu Pujan
subTitle: When the shadow of evil starts taking over the world, a warrior fights for good, as an avatar of Narasimha, a lion god, who is known for destroying evil.

title: The Great Indian Butterfly
subTitle: A young couple named Krish and Meera are confused and frustrated at the corporate rat race unfolding around them and, as an antidote, they they go in search of a legendary magical insect.

title: Colors Cineplex
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Bal Ganesh And The Pomjom Planet IV
subTitle: Bal Ganesh's friends accidentally crash-land on a planet named Pomzom, where they are held captive. Bal Ganesh must rush to save his friends.

title: Mahadev Ka Gorakhpur
subTitle: When evil descends chaotically upon the goodness of the land, a righteous warrior of Lord Shiva arrives to deliver justice to the wicked.

title: Ram Ki Jung
subTitle: A man who does not believe in love after going through a heartbreak is in a relationship with a young woman. But when she asks him to be with her all his life, he hesitates to accept her proposal.

title: Power Unlimited
subTitle: The government recruits a police officer aspirant to pose as a cop in the bid to complete an unfinished mission.

title: Yudh Ek Jung
subTitle: Chandu, a worker at a supermarket, rescues aspiring actress Indu from goons. He also takes on the blame of a crime committed at the store. While in prison, he learns secrets about his life.

title: Singam 2
subTitle: An undercover cop is given a secret assignment by the home minister to put an end to a smuggling ring.

title: Golmaal Again
subTitle: Five orphan men return to the orphanage they grew up in to attend their mentor's funeral, unexpectedly running into the ghost of their childhood friend, Khushi.

title: Bogan
subTitle: A police officer who is working on a bank robbery case arrests a man who is harbouring a supernatural secret.
